subcodes.first_line: The sweetness of Divine utterance is of such a station that, were all who dwell upon the earth to hearken unto it, all would soar unto the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حلاوت بیان الهی بمقامی است که اگر من علی الارض باصغای آن فائز شوند کل بافق
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
